overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing third-person driving of a convertible through Night City's neon-lit downtown, transitioning between sunlit open streets and covered highway underpasses with varying traffic density.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with palm trees and commercial buildings

events.description: passing under the Farber street sign while maintaining speed
entering the shadow cast by elevated highway structure ahead

agents.ego_description: driving convertible along multi-lane city street following traffic flow at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
modern glass facade building with reflective windows
large concrete overpass spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: Driving a convertible along a sunlit multi-lane arterial road lined with palm trees and modern glass buildings. The vehicle approaches and passes under a street sign for Farber while maintaining moderate speed with other traffic, entering the shadow of an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with overhead billboards and red structural beams

events.description: entering covered highway section with yellow safety railings on both sides
exiting the covered underpass back into open air and sunlight

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the covered highway underpass section

entered.detail: concrete roof structure covering the highway with support columns
bright yellow guardrails lining the left side of the road
large advertising displays mounted on the ceiling of the underpass
painted red steel beams supporting the highway ceiling
red neon sign for BD Shack visible on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered highway underpass with yellow safety railings and overhead billboards. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial as the vehicle passes through the concrete structure with red ceiling beams visible, then exits back to open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial district with mega-corporation towers and elevated walkways

events.description: Orbital Air tower becomes visible in the distance dominating the skyline
approaching heavier traffic congestion near the downtown core

agents.ego_description: accelerating through open downtown streets toward the city center and Orbital Air plaza

notable_agents.action: silver sports car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: massive corporate skyscraper with Orbital Air signage near the top
large yellow billboard advertising All Foods with mascot character
pink neon signage for Houston visible on right side buildings
enclosed walkway bridge crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: Emerging into open downtown streets with the massive Orbital Air tower dominating the skyline ahead. The area features dense neon signage including the All Foods billboard and elevated pedestrian walkways crossing above the road while accelerating toward the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: congested downtown intersection near Orbital Air with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: traffic slows significantly due to congestion with intense sun glare from ahead
weaving between slower vehicles and changing lanes to maintain progress

agents.ego_description: navigating through heavy traffic, changing lanes to maintain speed while approaching the Orbital Air plaza

notable_agents.action: slow-moving delivery truck ahead causing traffic backup
red sedan merging into the lane from the right side

entered.detail: lower commercial structure at the base of the Orbital Air tower
large electronic billboards displaying animated advertisements
orange and white traffic barriers separating lanes

segments.scene_description: Navigating through heavy traffic congestion near the Orbital Air plaza, with intense sun glare creating backlighting conditions. The driver weaves between slower vehicles including a truck ahead while surrounded by dense urban architecture and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with distinctive red structural beams and teal wall accents

events.description: entering covered underpass with distinctive red ceiling beams and teal walls
exiting the underpass back to open city streets

agents.ego_description: driving through covered underpass section with distinctive red architecture before returning to open streets

entered.detail: underpass with prominent red painted steel beams forming the ceiling
walls with distinctive teal colored panels and trim
illuminated digital displays showing advertisements on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Entering a final covered underpass characterized by distinctive red structural beams and teal accent walls, then exiting back to open city streets. The section features digital advertising screens and shop fronts along the sides before opening up to the final stretch of road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic metropolis, transitioning from sunlit arterial roads into the shadowed depths of urban underpasses and finally toward a dense, neon-lit city center. It begins along a bright multi-lane road lined with palm trees and glass buildings, passing under a Farber street sign before the vehicle enters the shadow of an elevated highway. As the camera glides into a covered underpass, the lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial glow beneath red ceiling beams and yellow safety railings, before emerging back into the open air where the massive Orbital Air tower dominates the skyline. The scene then expands into the heart of downtown, weaving through heavy traffic and intense sun glare beneath elevated pedestrian walkways and All Foods billboards. Finally, the vehicle passes through one last underpass characterized by teal accent walls and red structural beams before exiting onto a final stretch of open city streets lined with digital advertising screens.
